- [Delete AuthSession](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsauthsessions/delete-authsession.md): Delete an AuthSession by ID.
- [Get AuthSession](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsauthsessions/get-authsession.md): Get an AuthSession by ID.
- [Get AuthSessions](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsauthsessions/get-authsessions.md): Get all AuthSessions in a Project.
- [Create AuthSession - Result](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsauthsessionscreate/create-authsession--result.md): Get AuthSession creation result.
- [Create AuthSession - Start](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsauthsessionscreate/create-authsession--start.md): Start creating an AuthSession.
- [Update AuthSession - Result](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsauthsessionsupdate/update-authsession--result.md): Get AuthSession update result.
- [Update AuthSession - Start](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsauthsessionsupdate/update-authsession--start.md): Start updating an AuthSession.
- [Validate AuthSession - Result](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsauthsessionsvalidate/validate-authsession--result.md): Get AuthSession validation result.
- [Validate AuthSession - Start](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsauthsessionsvalidate/validate-authsession--start.md): Start AuthSession validation.
- [Create Job](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobs/create-job.md): Create a new Job for a Project.
- [Delete Job](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobs/delete-job.md): Delete a Job by ID.
- [Get Job](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobs/get-job.md): Get a Job by ID.
- [Get Jobs](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobs/get-jobs.md): Get all Jobs in a Project.
- [Pause Job](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobs/pause-job.md): Pause a Job. Pauses any JobRuns and the Job schedule if applicable.
- [Resume Job](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobs/resume-job.md): Resume a paused Job. Resumes any paused JobRuns and the Job schedule if applicable.
- [Trigger Job](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobs/trigger-job.md): Manually trigger a JobRun. Fails if the Job is paused.
- [Update Job](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobs/update-job.md): Update a Job by ID.
- [Get Job Run](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobsruns/get-job-run.md): Get information and results for a specific JobRun.
- [Get Job Runs](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobsruns/get-job-runs.md): Get all JobRuns for a Job.
- [Terminate Job Run](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsjobsruns/terminate-job-run.md): Terminate a JobRun by ID.
- [Run API - Result](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsruns/run-api--result.md): Get Run result.
- [Run API - Start](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/projectsruns/run-api--start.md): Start a Run for a Project.
- [Sink Body](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/sinks/body.md)
- [Overview](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/sinks/overview.md): What are sinks and how to use them
- [AWS S3 Sink](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/sinks/s3.md)
- [Webhook Sink](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/sinks/webhook.md)
- [Web Task - Result](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/webtasks/web-task--result.md): Get the status and result of a Web Task. The response is a discriminated union on `status`; the `completed` branch carries an `outcome` plus outcome-specific fields.
- [Web Task - Start](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/api-reference/webtasks/web-task--start.md): Start a Web Task. The task runs asynchronously; poll the result endpoint for status and output.
- [Overview](https://intunedhq.com/docs/client-apis/overview.md)

## OpenAPI Specs

- [all_generated](https://intunedhq.com/docs/_resources/openapi/generated/all_generated.yaml)
